description: Create a geographic hierarchy named 'Geo Drilldown' in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset to enable drill-down functionality. The hierarchy must be defined with the levels Region, State, and City in descending order. Create a Bar Chart visualization using the 'Geo Drilldown' hierarchy and 'Sales' data. Save the workbook as 'geo_drilldown.dva' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\'.
